Restaurant Order Management System

The complete restaurant order management system for India

Manage all your online food delivery orders, menu updates, and analytics from a single powerful platform.

Start for Free Get a Demo

Features

Features that are innovative, powerful and most wanted for your restaurant!

Order Management

Receive all your food delivery orders in one place. Accept, reject, and track orders from Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo and other platforms without switching between apps.

Read More

Menu Management

Automate your menu and pricing updates via Foaps and eliminate the need to update on each delivery platform manually. Revise your pricing, modify the menu and confirm the availability of items by just updating on Foaps alone. The changes will be then reflected across all food delivery platforms in no time.

Read More

In-depth reports

Identify the best performing fields, the areas that need attention, the potential areas of improvement and find productive insights to grow your business via our comprehensive, in-depth reports generated on the basis of your past order data.

Read More

Who can use FOAPS?

  • Restaurants
  • Bakery
  • Cafe
  • Cloud Kitchen
  • Food Truck

Loved and believed by people beyond boundaries!

  • "Foaps has completely transformed how we manage our orders. We no longer miss any orders from Swiggy or Zomato. Everything is in one place and it's super easy to use."

    Geethu

    Haji Ali

  • "Managing orders from multiple platforms was a nightmare before Foaps. Now we handle everything from a single screen. Our efficiency has gone up significantly."

    Sathar

    Mallus Dhaba

  • "The menu management feature is a game changer. I update once and it reflects everywhere. Saved us so much time every day."

    Razeen
